title: 8 Herbal Essential Oils For Cough
description: Zingiber officinale essential oils contains active constituents like gingerol and shogaol. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and cough. Gingerol's ability to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals, like prostaglandins, reduces swelling in the airways and makes it easier to breathe. Shogaol's expectorant properties help to loosen and clear mucus, making it easier to cough up. The combination of these propert...
